title: Fiery Smoked Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A sweet and crumbly Mediterranean dish featuring hot smoked paprika, perfect for a dinner gathering, this kosher-friendly recipe is served on a hot stone plate.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the hot stone plate with olive oil and heat it on the grill for 2 minutes.
Place the skewers on the hot stone plate and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Sprinkle the hot smoked paprika over the lamb kebabs and serve immediately.
Garnish with cherry tomatoes and serve hot.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
